Function: ABS Wheel Speed Sensor Connector Plug Repair Loom serving as a crucial component of the ABS system, facilitates the connection between the wheel speed sensor and the vehicle's electronic control unit. By ensuring a secure and stable connection, it enables the accurate transmission of wheel speed data, which is essential for the proper functioning of the ABS system. Maintaining this connection is vital for safe and efficient braking, enhancing overall driving safety and performance

Reliable Material: Crafted from dependable plastic materials, the 2 Pin ABS Wheel Speed Sensor Connector Plug Repair Loom 6E0973702 ensures reliability and functionality. The construction of this connector plug repair loom prioritizes durability and performance, offering a reliable solution for addressing ABS wheel speed sensor issues, contributing to the overall efficiency of your vehicle's ABS system
